data.body: Implemented in src/rebar/llm/plan_review/passes.py: pass3_decide() + validity()/impact()/severity_label(). Pass-3 is fully deterministic (no model in the decision path): validity = graded fraction of the binary sub-answers (yes=1/insufficient=.5/no=0); impact = mean of the ordinal-mapped severity attributes; unified priority = validity x impact; decision = block|advisory|dropped with the cited-reference veto + per-criterion block_threshold (default 0.95 => advisory in v1). INDETERMINATE when no verification. Wired into orchestrator._run_passes (Pass-3 loop). Unit-tested: tests/unit/test_plan_review.py::test_pass3_* (validity, impact/priority, advisory-by-default, opt-in blocking, low-validity drop, cited-ref veto, indeterminate).
